name: Tortoni of Coffee with Chicory
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat egg whites at room temperature and cream of tartar until soft peaks form. Gradually add half the sugar, beating until very stiff.
2. In a separate bowl, beat heavy cream, remaining sugar, and half the coffee until stiff.
3. On low speed, blend in the remaining coffee, coffee liqueur (optional), and half the almonds.
4. Spoon the mixture into an 8-inch springform pan; sprinkle with the remaining almonds.
5. Cover with plastic wrap or foil; freeze for about 4 hours until firm.
6. To serve, scoop from the pan or cut into slices.
